RedeemPage.title: Redeem your Sparks
RedeemPage.description: Redeem the Sparks you have earned directly to your Bank, PayPal, Crypto, or any gift card of your choice. Withdraw to your favorite methods starting at $1.

disclaimer.companies: We are not a representation of any of the companies listed above. We are not affiliated with any of the companies listed above. We are not responsible for any of the companies listed above.
disclaimer.withdrawals: We reserve the right to reject any redemption for any reason. Withdrawals are typically sent within 48 hours after review of your request and may take longer if we need to verify your identity.
